programmes.show_description: Gwenneth and Min come to visit Alf. They decide to hold a seance to talk to long departed friends. S3 E4
With Freddie Mercury, Gary Numan, The Shadows and The Pretenders. The legendary BAFTA-winning comedy extravaganza from Thames TV (1980) - and all in the best possible taste!
Simon witnesses a murder and finds himself in the midst of a mystery involving a faithless wife and smuggled jewels. S1 E5: The Loaded Tourist
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!

Your favourite music from the 1960s - non-stop.
The Red Baron, Germany's top WWI ace, was shot down in 1918. Though he landed his plane, he died soon after but was it accidental? Narrated by Robert Powell.
When it was impossible for aircraft to land safely on enemy territory, gliders were the perfect answer for delivering special forces behind enemy lines. Ep3: Gliders
This episode focuses on the tools of espionage employed by both the Allies and the Axis during WW2. E4: Weapons of the Shadow War
We look at the British Armoured Division, known as the Desert Rats, who conducted an epic campaign against Rommel's Axis forces in the deserts of Egypt and Libya. Ep4: Desert Rats
The many variants of the A-1 Skyraider single piston-engined fighter bomber helped dominate the air to ground attack role in Vietnam and earned quite the reputation. S2 E4
As the incredible stories of those at sea are heard, relentless attacks by U-boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat the Nazi empire. Ep3: U-Boat Terror
Operation Market Garden was an attempt by the allies to use airborne units to seize key bridges and short cut the attack into northern Germany. We look at the plan, leaders and the weapons involved.
Examining the history of war tactics. We explore the use of aerial battles, including the Battle of Britain in 1940, in military conflicts. S1 E10
A look at how the West End became a place for the wealthy elite, the impact of the railways, a cholera epidemic and engineer Joseph Bazalgette saving London with his new sewerage system. Ep3
The Supermarine Spitfire aircraft begged the question of how important air combat is in WWII - it has been clear that dominating the skies is essential in battle since then. E4: Pure Fighter
We search for remains of warships from WWI and WWII in the remote Pacific and the Atlantic while revealing new insights into how the atomic bomb changed the world forever. Ep4: Nuclear Wrecks
The Resistance asked for help in late 1943 as some of their top operatives were being held in Amiens prison and needed rescuing from facing interrogation, torture and execution. Ep2: Prison Busters
Jack develops a taste for the high life, but it proves too rich for Dolly. S2 E9: After the Bonfire
Penniless and facing the threat of deportation from Australia, Ray and Arthur must try to raise funds for a return airfare home. S9 E13: For a Few Dollars More
Dwight enlists in the navy to forget Caroline, and Demelza visits Verity to spend some time apart from Ross while he considers rejoining his regiment. Starring Aidan Turner. S2 E10

Drama series about a detective who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. As heroin hits the streets of Manchester, CID want culprits for the smuggling, dealing and ensuing violence. With John Simm. S2 E6
Alf has a fight at a tea dance and arranges to meet up again with his adversary outside his house. S3 E5
With Boomtown Rats and Suzi Quatro. The legendary BAFTA-winning comedy extravaganza from Thames TV (1980). All in the best possible taste!
Simon helps subsidise a man's dream of adventure and excitement, but the dream becomes a nightmare until a woman's devotion brings the man back to happiness. S1 E6: The Pearls of Peace

Your favourite music from the 1960s - non-stop.
Nothing before or since has equalled the splendour and magnificence of Tutankhamun but is there a darker secret held within. Narrated by Robert Powell.
Giant aircraft carriers dominated the Pacific War between Japan and the USA - Pearl Harbor was launched to destroy US carriers but failed. Ep4: Aircraft Carriers
Priceless art, personal assets and national treasures were an extraordinary amount of loot prized by Hitler as much as territory - we discover the organised plunder of these riches. S1 E5: Nazi Gold
After escaping the German invasion of their homeland in 1939, Polish fighter pilots and ground forces played a key role in the liberation of western Europe. Ep5: The Free Polish Forces
The definitive combat helicopter saw first blood in South East Asia and has been transport, gunship, smoke ship, command centre, MediVac and dozens of other roles. S2 E5
We experience the event that changed the war's course and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces. Ep4: Pearl Harbor
We tell the story of the crucial battles for control of the Mediterranean, North Africa, and the irreplaceable oil fields in World War 2 and the story of the war in Greece.
Examining the history of war tactics. We explore defensive battles, including the 1943 Battle of Kursk where the Red Army dug in against the Germans and triumphed. S1 E11
An exploration of London's underground railway and skyline, the origins of Metro-land - London's vast suburbia - and the clever marketing that tempted millions to move outside the city. Ep4
Artillery hasn't really changed; once the foundation of battle in WWII, it appears as though artillery isn't going anywhere until political and moral issues regarding accuracy arise. E5: Gods of War
Divers explore underwater graveyards from the American bombardment of the Japanese fleet in WWII and how the German liner Wilhelm Gustloff was torpedoed by a Russian sub. Ep5: Savage Revenge
As Britain began to strike Nazi Germany, it was soon suffering losses from hi-tech air defences; in 1941, British paratroops were sent to seize a German radar system which needed to be cracked.
There is an accident at the Lewis Bishop Ship Yard and one of the fitters is badly hurt. S2 E10: A Wreath with Our Names On
Arthur needs to raise some cash fast, but will insurance fraud and pawning the jewellery of 'er indoors' raise more problems than it will solve? S10 E1: A Fridge Too Far
Ross and Demelza look to forget the past and rebuild their marriage, but new arrivals threaten their fragile reconciliation. Starring Aidan Turner. S3 E1
Drama series about a detective who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. Sam gets to work on proving DCI Hunt's innocence in the shooting of a local underworld bookie. Starring John Simm. S2 E7
